name: VibroPower Corporation Limited
summary: VibroPower Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, supplies, installs, commissions, and services generators primarily for commercial and industrial properties, and housing projects in Singapore, rest of Asia, and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Projects, Power Plant, and Others. It also trades in, installs, commissions, and services diesel generators; and manufactures and repairs electric generators. In addition, the company engages in the import, export, and sale of engines and spare parts; trade of generator parts and accessories; and development, operation, and management of power generation projects. VibroPower Corporation Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Singapore.
